velocity_posts.text: Ah, I see it's "Cops call for kill switch" day again. It rolls round so fast these days I actually forgot to hang out the bunting www.bbc.co.uk/news/article...

Mobile phone crime won’t be solved by policing alone. It also needs coordinated action from industry. 

Having already seen the advanced security features introduced by Google and Samsung, I welcome the new agreement between Apple and the Met to protect mobile phone users.

This is actually incredible and quite humbling. 

It has barely been 2 hours and I've raised nearly £2k. Most of it has come from Bluesky.

I can't thank everyone enough, whether you have given or just shared. 

Let's smash the target - you're making JD Vance, Putin, and all the other Vatniks sad.
